riemann_zeta_style.name: riemann_zeta_style
riemann_zeta_style.python_implementation:
def custom_function(z, normalize_type='N'):
    import numpy as np
    import math
    import cmath
    import scipy.special
    
    z_real = np.real(z)
    z_imag = np.imag(z)
    
    try:
        result = np.sin(math.pi*z)
        
        if normalize_type == 'Y':
            result = result / scipy.special.gamma(result) if abs(result) < 100 else result
        
        return abs(result) if np.isfinite(result) else 0.0
    except:
        return 0.0
riemann_zeta_style.author: System
